metadata.name: cdbt
metadata.summary: A CLI tool to manage dbt builds with state handling and manifest management

methods.name: cdbt.ai_core.AiCore._get_sample_data_from_snowflake
documentation:
Compiles the target model to SQL, then breaks out each sub query and CTE into a separate SQL strings, executing
each to get a sample of the data.
Args:
    model_name: A list of target model names to pull sample data from.

Returns:

modules.name: cdbt.sort_yaml_fields
documentation: Using this instead of the default as it preserves the order of keys in the dictionary.

classes.name: cdbt.sort_yaml_fields.SortYAML
documentation: Modify the dumper to not sort keys and to use ordered dict format

classes.name: cdbt.build_dbt_docs_ai.BuildDBTDocs
documentation: # Make sure you have OPENAI_API_KEY set in your environment variables.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.build
documentation: Execute a DBT build command passthrough.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.trun
documentation: Execute a DBT run, then test command.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.run
documentation: Pass through to DBT run command.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.test
documentation: Pass through to DBT test command.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.unittest
documentation: Run unit tests on models.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.compile
documentation: Pass through to DBT compile.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.clip_compile
documentation: Pass through to DBT compile.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.sbuild
documentation: Build models based on changes in current state since last build.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.pbuild
documentation: Build models based on changes from production to current branch.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.gbuild
documentation: Build models based on Git changes from production to current branch.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.build_docs
documentation: Build dbt YML model docs for a model. This command will sample the database.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.build_unit
documentation: Build unit test mock and expect data for a model. This command will sample the database.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.ld_preview
documentation: Start a lightdash preview for a model.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.format
documentation: Format models using sqlfluff.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.clean_stg
documentation: Designed to clean files in the L1_stg folders only

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.clean_clip
documentation: This will clean and sort a series of select statements from your clipboard and put back to clipboard when done.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.pop_yaml
documentation: Build the YAML PoP macro columns for a given model targeted in the select statement.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.ma_yaml
documentation: Build the YAML Moving Avearage macro columns for a given model targeted in the select statement.

functions.name: cdbt.cmdline.pre_commit
documentation: Run pre-commit hooks.

classes.name: cdbt.cmdline.CustomCmdLoader
documentation: Create a Click group

methods.name: cdbt.main.ColdBoreCapitalDBT.gbuild
documentation:
Build based off of a Git diff of changed models.

Args:
    ctx:
    full_refresh:
    threads:

Returns:

methods.name: cdbt.main.ColdBoreCapitalDBT.format
documentation:
Scan for files that have changed since the last commit and pass them to sqlfluff fix command for cleanup.

Args:
    ctx: Context object.

methods.name: cdbt.main.ColdBoreCapitalDBT.execute_dbt_command_capture
documentation:
Executes a DBT command and captures the output without streaming to the stdout.
Args:
    command: The DBT command to run.
    args: A list of args to pass into the command.

Returns:
    A string containing the results of the command.

methods.name: cdbt.main.ColdBoreCapitalDBT.execute_dbt_command_stream
documentation:
Execute a dbt command with the given arguments. This function will stream the output of the command in real-time
Args:
    command: The DBT command to run.
    args: A list of args to pass into the command.

Returns:
    True if successful, False if error.

methods.name: cdbt.main.ColdBoreCapitalDBT.extract_sql_code
documentation:
Extract the SQL code from the given log string.

Parameters:
log (str): The log string containing the header info and SQL code.

Returns:
str: The extracted SQL code.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner.main
documentation: Reads the SQL file, cleans up merged words, and sorts lines based on specified criteria.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._remove_empty_lines
documentation:
Remove empty lines that are just 

Args:
    all_lines: A list containing all the selected lines.

Returns:
    A list with the empty lines removed.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._read_sort_section
documentation:
Reads the SQL file and returns the lines between `final as (` and `from raw_source` as a list of strings.

Returns:
    List[str]: The lines of the SQL file between the specified sections.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._remove_trailing_comma
documentation:
Removes trailing commas from lines.

Args:
    lines (List[str]): The lines of the SQL file to clean.

Returns:
    List[str]: The cleaned lines with trailing commas removed.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._clean_merged_words
documentation:
Identifies merged words in SQL aliases and separates them using the OpenAI API.

Args:
    lines (List[str]): The lines of the SQL file to clean.

Returns:
    List[str]: The cleaned lines with separated alias words.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._ensure_is_flag_split
documentation:
Ensures that if the line starts with is, it will be split into `is_` and the rest of the line.

Args:
    alias (str): The line to check.

Returns:
    str: The line with is_ prefixed if necessary.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._check_that_datetime_contains_at
documentation:
Checks that the line ends in _at if the data type is a date type.

Args:
    line (str): The line to check.
    data_type (str): The data type of the line.

Returns:
    str: The line with _at appended if necessary.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._check_that_bool_starts_with_is
documentation:
Checks that the alias starts with is_ if the data type is a bool type.

Args:
    line (str): The line to check.
    data_type (str): The data type of the line.

Returns:
    str: The line with is_ prepended if necessary.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._is_transform_function
documentation:
Args:
    alias:

Returns:

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._split_words
documentation:
Calls the OpenAI API to separate merged words.

Args:
    words (List[str]): The list of merged words to separate.

Returns:
    List[str]: The separated words.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._remove_airbyte_specific_lines
documentation:
Removes specific lines containing unwanted SQL patterns related to Airbyte.

Args:
    lines (List[str]): The lines of the SQL file to clean.

Returns:
    List[str]: The lines of the SQL file with the specified lines removed.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._sort_lines_alphabetically
documentation:
Sorts the lines of the SQL file alphabetically.

Args:
    lines (List[str]): The lines of the SQL file to sort.

Returns:
    List[str]: The alphabetically sorted lines of the SQL file.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._sort_sql_lines
documentation:
Sorts the lines of the SQL file based on the specified criteria.

Args:
    lines (List[str]): The lines of the SQL file to sort.

Returns:
    List[str]: The sorted lines of the SQL file.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._alias_id_column
documentation:
Adds the name of the model to ID column. For example, id becomes appointment_id

Args:
    lines (List[str]): The lines of the SQL file to clean.
    model_name (str): The name of the model to append.

Returns:
    List[str]: The cleaned lines with trailing commas removed.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._add_trailing_comma
documentation:
Adds trailing comma and /n to all lines except for the last. The last line is only given a /n.

Args:
    lines (List[str]): The lines of the SQL file to clean.

Returns:
    List[str]: The cleaned lines with trailing commas added.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._insert_sorted_lines
documentation:
Inserts the sorted lines back into the full list of lines.

Args:
    full_lines (List[str]): The full list of lines to insert the sorted lines into.
    sorted_lines (List[str]): The sorted lines to insert into the full list of lines.
    start_ix (int): The starting index of the section to insert the sorted lines into.
    end_ix (int): The ending index of the section to insert the sorted lines into.

Returns:
    List[str]: The full list of lines with the sorted lines inserted.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._approve_output
documentation:
Prints the cleaned and sorted lines to the console and prompts the user to approve the changes.

Args:
    full_lines (List[str]): The cleaned and sorted lines to print to the console.

methods.name: cdbt.cbc_sql_standards_system.SQLModelCleaner._write_sql_file
documentation:
Writes the cleaned and sorted lines back to the SQL file.

Args:
    lines (List[str]): The cleaned and sorted lines to write to the file.
